text:
EVANGELION INFINITY is a three disc album with various remixes, unreleased tracks and alternative versions of musics featured in the Evangelion franchise. It was published by King Records via the label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE on 21 July 2021 with catalog numbers KICA-2589~91 https://vgmdb.net/album/111628 . The music was composed and arranged by Shirō Sagisu and other artists. It was published outside Japan by Milan Records on 23 September 2022. https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/press-release/2022-09-24/available-digitally-for-the-first-time-outside-japan-evangelion-infinity-and-evangelion-vox/.190086
